title: Provide local Muzi R1 Neo hardware for flash/smoke test
description: Blocks project-LICHEN-ev5b.5. The host currently has no detectable Muzi Works R1 Neo/R1 hardware attached: no /Volumes/R1-Neo or Adafruit UF2 mass-storage volume, no Nordic/Adafruit/Muzi CDC/DFU USB device in ioreg, and only unrelated serial devices (/dev/cu.usbserial-A704ESXG FT232R plus debug/wlan/Bluetooth ports). Attach the R1 Neo in bootloader or app serial mode, or provide remote console/flashing access, then resume the flash and smoke test.
